segments.text: Dominion and fear are with him. He makes peace in his high places.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Can his armies be counted? On whom does his light not arise?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How then can man be just with God? Or how can he who is born of a woman be clean?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Behold, even the moon has no brightness, and the stars are not pure in his sight;
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How much less man, who is a worm, and the son of man, who is a worm!
segments.speaker: Bildad
